free_text: Natural germanium targets(138 mg and 144 mg)
placed between thin aluminum foils (57 mg and
65 mg, respectively) -two Ge/Al targets -A and B.
For the short-lived Ge-75-M state the 136 keV 'IT'
gamma-rays were used in evaluation. In all other
cases decay gammas after beta emission were used.
